def negative_exception_handler_returns_default_without_any_logging():
    rule_id = "exception_handler_returns_default_without_any_logging"
    family = "discipline"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Broad except block returns a default value without logging the caught exception."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
